---
title: "Geostatistics: Random Fields, Kriging, and the SPDE Approach"
subtitle: "GEO-001 | Track B — Geospatial"
description: "The theory of spatially correlated data on continuous domains. Covers random field theory, variogram estimation, kriging, model-based geostatistics, and the modern SPDE approach linking spatial statistics to PDEs and finite elements."
date: "2026-04-11"
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
number-sections: true
---

# Geostatistics: Random Fields, Kriging, and the SPDE Approach

*Content not yet generated.*

Run the generation pipeline and then `src/quarto_export.jl` to populate this page.
